title: Unify guard canonical and legacy state mapping
rawUserRequest: 执行项目校准计划工单 7：把旧 Ready/Partial/Inconsistent 降级为由 Canonical State 派生的兼容层，统一 Decision Model，并保持 fail-closed；不启动工单 1。

declaredIntent.summary: Make canonical guard states authoritative and legacy values derived only.

outOfScope: Starting Work Item 1 or later Work Items

sources.reason: Canonical and legacy guard state mapping.

riskAssessment.reason: State derivation is deterministic and preserves existing fail-closed mappings.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized serial execution of this bounded governance Work Item.

preReviewWarnings: Reject dual semantic combinations and verify all gate consumers use canonical state.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Canonical state is authoritative and includes allow/review/confirm/block/error/not_applicable.
Legacy Ready/Partial/Inconsistent values are one-way derived compatibility output; invalid combinations fail closed.
Trust schema, guards, tests, and documentation prove consumers use the same Decision Model.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Legacy and canonical state fields can drift or express two meanings, making downstream gates inconsistent.
constraints: Preserve fail-closed behavior and existing legacy compatibility output.
Do not add a second independent decision model.
Do not start Work Item 1 or later Work Items.
intent.rationale: A single canonical state makes every gate consume the same decision semantics.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: allowed canonical state with derived legacy value

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized serial execution of the recalibration plan, including this state protocol Work Item.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
